title: W6 Graph3D performance and extension-point checks
command: cargo test --manifest-path viewer-api/viewer-api/frontend/dioxus/Cargo.toml graph3d -- --nocapture && cd memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus && npm run test:e2e:release -- graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts
detail: Validates Graph3D performance baseline for focus/LOD/neighbourhood workloads and preserves extension contracts for additional viewers.
